question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?
Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?
among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?
among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?
among the other representative work of the author of hunter x hunter, which one is talking about middle school student?
On which stock exchanges are Siemens AG shares traded?
Apart from the book series the witcher, name all of the author’s notable work.
are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?brookeState ?colinState WHERE {
  wd:Q105737834 wdt:P19 ?brookeBirthPlace .
  wd:Q105737835 wdt:P19 ?colinBirthPlace .
  ?brookeBirthPlace wdt:P131 ?brookeState .
  ?colinBirthPlace wdt:P131 ?colinState .
  FILTER (?brookeState = ?colinState)
}

question.string: What is the boiling point of water?
At which school was Yayoi Kusama educated at?
Which High School did Allen Ginsberg attend?
On which island is the Indonesian capital located?
can i play don't starve on play station 4?
How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P3975 wd:Q385709 .
  ?item wdt:P361 wd:Q513 .
  FILTER ( ?item != wd:Q7177 ) .
  FILTER ( ?item < wd:Q7177 )
}

question.string: How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?president) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?president p:P35 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P35 ?position .
  FILTER (?position = wd:Q11696) .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?startDate .
  FILTER (?startDate > "1990-01-01"^^xsd:date)
}

question.string: Did adam ondra win a medal in the 2020 summer olympics?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?medal ?event
WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?person wdt:P735 "Adam Ondra" .
  ?person p:P2522 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P2522 ?medal .
  ?statement pq:P2416 wd:Q28715076 .
  ?statement pq:P585 "2020-01-01"^^xsd:dateTime .
  ?statement pq:P585 "2020-12-31"^^xsd:dateTime .
  FILTER (?medal = wd:Q20994467 || ?medal = wd:Q20994513 || ?medal = wd:Q20994514) .
}

question.string: Did the Chicago Bulls win at least two seasons of the NBA championship?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?team ?seasonsWon
WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q39719 .
  ?team wdt:P1813 "Chicago Bulls"@en .
  ?team wdt:P5138 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P3450 wd:Q82797 .
  ?season wdt:P2522 wd:Q18644492 .
}
GROUP BY ?team
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?season) >= 2)

question.string: Did Haruki Murakami receive the Nobel Prize in Literature?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel
WHERE
{
  ?item wdt:P166 wd:Q380043 .
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?item wdt:P9687 "Haruki" .
  ?item rdfs:label ?itemLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?itemLabel), "en"))
}

question.string: Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?kobeBryant ?lebronJames ?lakers ?joinYear ?leaveYear
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q5234 AS ?kobeBryant)
  BIND(wd:Q36322 AS ?lebronJames)
  BIND(wd:Q160436 AS ?lakers)
  ?kobeBryant p:P54 ?kobeStatement .
  ?kobeStatement ps:P54 ?lakers .
  ?kobeStatement pq:P582 ?leaveYear .
  ?lebronJames p:P54 ?lebronStatement .
  ?lebronStatement ps:P54 ?lakers .
  ?lebronStatement pq:P580 ?joinYear .
  FILTER (?leaveYear = ?joinYear)
}

question.string: Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?
Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?founder wdt:P112 ?company .
  ?company wdt:P1705 "Tencent" .
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?university .
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) > 1)

question.string: Do all of batman’s partner speak english as native language?
How many spouses do head of states have on average?

query.sparql:
SELECT (AVG(COUNT(?spouse)) AS ?averageSpouses)
WHERE {
  ?headOfState p:P35 ?headOfStateStatement .
  ?headOfStateStatement ps:P35 ?person .
  ?person p:P26 ?spouseStatement .
  ?spouseStatement ps:P26 ?spouse .
} GROUP BY ()

question.string: Was there at least one Formula 1 event on the AVUS?
Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.
From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country (COUNT(DISTINCT ?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q190379 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

question.string: Does the music style of Helloween belong to rock music?
Does the postal code 32423 belong to Minden?
has adam ondra been a winner of IFSC climbing world cup?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel
WHERE
{
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?item wdt:P166 ?award .
  ?award wdt:P2522 ?competition .
  ?competition wdt:P279 wd:Q216627 .
  ?item wdt:P735 ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(str(?name), "Adam Ondra"))
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}

question.string: has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?lifeExpectancy ?nextYear ?nextLifeExpectancy
WHERE {
  ?iran wdt:P298 "IR" .
  ?observation1 psv:P2250 ?lifeExpectancyStatement1 .
  ?lifeExpectancyStatement1 pq:P585 ?year .
  FILTER (?year > "1999-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime) .
  ?observation2 psv:P2250 ?lifeExpectancyStatement2 .
  ?lifeExpectancyStatement2 pq:P585 ?nextYear .
  FILTER (?nextYear > ?year) .
  ?lifeExpectancyStatement1 ps:P2250 ?lifeExpectancy .
  ?lifeExpectancyStatement2 ps:P2250 ?nextLifeExpectancy .
  FILTER (?nextLifeExpectancy > ?lifeExpectancy) .
}

question.string: has population of Isfahan increased at any point after 2006?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?population
WHERE {
  wd:Q194066 p:P1082 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1082 ?population .
  ?statement pq:P585 ?year .
  FILTER (?year > "2006-01-01"^^xsd:date)
  FILTER (EXISTS { wd:Q194066 p:P1082 ?previousStatement .
                   ?previousStatement ps:P1082 ?previousPopulation .
                   ?previousStatement pq:P585 ?previousYear .
                   FILTER (?previousYear < ?year) .
                   FILTER (?population > ?previousPopulation)
                 })
}

How many of Reinhold Messner's brothers still live?
In which manner did Hemingway die?
In which industry does the House of Medici own a business?
How do people from Turkey call the official name of the united states of america?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel ?nativeName
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q30 AS ?item).
  ?item rdfs:label ?itemLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?itemLabel), "tr")).
  ?item wdt:P1559 ?nativeName .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?nativeName), "tr"))
}

question.string: How high is the Cologne Cathedral ?
How is the Harz called in Mandarin Chinese?
How many international airports are located within the city of Hamburg ?
On how many albums does Madonna perform?
On how many albums does Mariah Carey perform?
How many studio albums has Lana Del Rey have?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?album) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?album wdt:P175 ?artist .
  ?artist wdt:P735 "Lana Del Rey"@en .
  ?album wdt:P31 wd:Q4829940 .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?album wdt:P581 ?end } .
  FILTER EXISTS { ?album wdt:P577 ?release } .
}

question.string: How many ancient civilizations are there?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS (?count)) WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q28171241 }

question.string: In how many years did Kobe Bryant receive an NBA All-Defensive Team award?

How many children (including apopted ones) does Jeff Bezos have with his ex-wife?
How many children had Paul McCartney together with his ex-wife Linda McCartney?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?child) AS ?number_of_children)
WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P26 wd:Q484578.
  ?person wdt:P735 "McCartney".
  ?child wdt:P22 ?person.
  ?child wdt:P25 wd:Q484578.
}

question.string: How many Chinese zodiac animals are there in total?

question.string: How many city-states are currently in the world?
How many businesses did Steve Jobs found?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?company) AS ?number)
WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P112 ?person .
  ?person wdt:P106 ?occupation .
  ?person wdt:P108 ?employer .
  ?person wdt:P2828 ?officer .
  FILTER (?officer = "founder") .
  FILTER (?person = wd:Q47922)
}

question.string: How many countries have a democracy index higher than 7 and drive on the left side ?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P30 wd:Q6256 .
  ?country wdt:P8328 ?democracyIndex .
  FILTER (?democracyIndex > 7) .
  ?country wdt:P162 ?drivesOn .
  ?drivesOn wdt:P452 ?side .
  FILTER (?side = "left") .
}

question.string: How many countries have never been members of the UN?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(*) AS (?count)) WHERE { ?item wdt:P17 ?country . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?item wdt:P1323 [] } }

question.string: How many countries are on the continent of South America ?
How many countries have mountains whose peaks are higher than 2000m above sea level?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?mountain wdt:P4552 ?mountain_range .
  ?mountain wdt:P2044 ?elevation .
  FILTER (?elevation > 2000) .
  ?country wdt:P300 ?mountain_range .
}

question.string: How many occupations did Mark Twain have?
how many of spiderman perfomers are citizens of the united kingdom?
how many official languages does the united states of america have?
How many official languages has Pakistan ?
How many Oscars did all the movies directed by Hayao Miyazaki combined win?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?award) AS ?totalAwards)
WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P57 wd:Q200524 .
  ?film wdt:P1411 ?nomination .
  ?nomination wdt:P1686 wd:Q190209 .
  ?nomination wdt:P2293 "won" .

}

question.string: How many paintings of Pablo Picasso were ever in a museum?
How many people can play "Mensch ärgere dich nicht" at most?
How many people did Oscar Pistorius kill?
How many people died due to the Great Leap Forward according to the highest estimate?

query.sparql:
SELECT (MAX(?deaths) AS ?total_deaths)
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q133821 .
  ?item wdt:P576 ?event .
  ?event wdt:P793 ?deaths .
  FILTER (?event = wd:Q8678)
}

question.string: How many people have won the Nobel Prize in Literature since its inception?
How many people live in cities in the vicinity of the Nile ?
How many pitch classes are part of the chromatic scale?
how many plays has William Shakespeare written in the 16th century.

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?play) AS ?numPlays)
WHERE {
  ?play wdt:P50 wd:Q692.
  ?play wdt:P31 wd:Q429098.
  ?play wdt:P577 ?date.
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) < 1601)
}

question.string: How many poems did Allen Ginsberg published?
How many political parties have ever had seats in the German Bundestag ?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?party) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?member ps:P102 ?party .
  ?member p:P102 ?partyStatement .
  ?partyStatement ps:P1713 ?bundestagUrl .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?bundestagUrl), "http://www.bundestag.de/bundestag/abgeordnete/biographien"))
}
